REW263_GOV_UKPAYTRANS.text: How would you describe your UK pay-transparency position (adverts, internal ranges, published policy)?

REW263_GOV_MENOPLAN.text: Have you published (or do you plan to publish) a voluntary menopause action plan ahead of the 2027 mandate?

REW263_GOV_ETHDISREADY.text: Are you prepared for mandatory ethnicity and disability pay gap reporting for 250+ employers (Equality (Race and Disability) Bill)?

REW263_GOV_UMBRELLA.text: Do you apply reward parity / compliance checks for umbrella-company and agency workers (ahead of umbrella regulation)?

REW263_GOV_FIREREHIRE.text: Where pay or pension/benefit terms are changed, do you avoid dismiss-and-rehire (fire-and-rehire restrictions, in force Jan 2027)?

REW263_GOV_REWTEAM.text: What is the size of your dedicated reward team relative to total FTE?

REW263_GOV_SIGNOFF.text: Where does final sign-off on the annual pay/reward decision sit (RemCo, HRD, Finance, CEO)?

REW263_GOV_BENOBJ.text: Are your employee benefits linked to defined objectives (e.g., retention, engagement, productivity) and reviewed against them?

REW263_GOV_FLEXALLOW.text: Do you provide a personalised/flexible benefits allowance employees can allocate by choice?

REW263_PAY_COMPARATIO.text: What is your typical target compa-ratio / position-in-range policy for fully competent performers?

REW263_PAY_MERITMATRIX.text: Do you use a formal merit matrix (performance rating x position-in-range) to differentiate pay increases?

REW263_PAY_SHIFTRIGHTS.text: Do you provide reasonable notice of shifts and short-notice cancellation payments to zero-/low-hours workers (ERA 2025 right to reasonable notice)?

REW263_PAY_GUARHRSAVG.text: For zero-/low-hours workers, do you offer guaranteed-hours contracts reflecting average hours worked (ERA 2025 right to guaranteed hours)?

REW263_PAY_SSPALIGN.text: Following SSP reform (removal of lower earnings limit and waiting days, April 2026), have you aligned your sick pay arrangements?

REW263_BEN_PMIMH.text: Does your PMI include mental health cover and/or digital GP access?

REW263_BEN_PMIEXCESS.text: What employee cost-share or excess applies to PMI (if any)?

REW263_BEN_CICOVER.text: What level of critical illness cover is provided (lump sum or salary multiple)?

REW263_BEN_DENTAL.text: Is dental cover employer-paid or employee-funded/voluntary?

REW263_BEN_NEURO.text: Do you provide neurodiversity support and/or a formal reasonable-adjustments process for reward/benefits access?

REW263_BEN_PENBASIS.text: On what earnings basis are pension contributions calculated (qualifying earnings vs full/basic pay)?

REW263_INC_DEFERRAL.text: For deferred bonuses, what is the typical deferral period and vehicle (cash vs shares)?

REW263_INC_POOLFUND.text: How is the main bonus pool funded (top-down profit share vs bottom-up target-based)?

REW263_REC_PEER.text: Do you operate a peer-to-peer recognition programme (points or social-recognition platform)?

REW263_REC_CURRENCY.text: Are recognition awards primarily monetary, experiential/voucher, or points-based?

REW263_REC_MGRBUDGET.text: Do you provide a personalised/flexible recognition budget to managers?

REW263_REC_IMPACT.text: Do you measure the impact of recognition on engagement or retention?

REW263_WEL_DATA.text: Which wellbeing/health data do you actively track (absence rates, PMI claims, wellbeing scores, EAP utilisation)?

REW263_WEL_OH.text: Do employees have access to occupational health, and what is the typical referral SLA?

REW263_WEL_MGRTRAIN.text: What proportion of people managers have completed mental-health awareness training?

REW263_WEL_FINWELL.text: Is there a documented financial wellbeing strategy beyond ad hoc provision?

REW263_TIME_IVF.text: How many funded IVF/fertility treatment cycles (or financial cap) do you provide, if any?

REW263_TIME_FERTLEAVE.text: Do you provide dedicated paid fertility-treatment leave (separate from sick/annual leave)?

REW263_TIME_NEONATAL.text: Do you provide paid neonatal care leave above the statutory entitlement (Neonatal Care Act, April 2025)?

REW263_TIME_PREGLOSS.text: Do you provide paid leave for pregnancy loss / miscarriage?

REW263_TIME_PATPAY.text: Do you provide enhanced paternity pay above statutory, and for how many weeks?

REW263_TIME_DAYONELEAVE.text: Have you made paternity and unpaid parental leave available from day one of employment (ERA 2025, April 2026)?

REW263_TIME_HOLRECORDS.text: Do you maintain compliant annual-leave and holiday-pay records (6-year retention, in force April 2026)?

REW263_TIME_CARERPAID.text: Do you offer enhanced carer's leave (paid) above the statutory unpaid entitlement?
